description: Legal document mentioning [...] b. Naḥman ha-Kohen, possibly the dissolution of a partnership, and 21 1/4 dinars. Written in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (1100–38) under the authority of Maṣliaḥ Gaʾon (1127–39). Dated: Either [143]8 or [144]8 Seleucid, so either 1127 CE or 1136/37 CE. There is writing on both sides and in the margins. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
